attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
SORCTLNGLDT.LINE_PERCENT,
SORCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT,
SORCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE,
SORCTLNGLDT.GL_POSTED_DATE,
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG,
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE14,
SORCTLNGLDT.ORG_ID,
SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE2,
SORCTLNGLDT.POSTING_CONTROL_ID,
SORCTLNGLDT.CREATION_DATE,
SORCTLNGLDT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCTLNGLDT.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCTLNGLDT.ACTION_CODE,
SORCTLNGLDT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SORCTLNGLDT
WHERE SORCTLNGLDT.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT 
 SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
 SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 SORCTLNGLDT.LINE_PERCENT,
 SORCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT,
 SORCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE,
 SORCTLNGLDT.GL_POSTED_DATE,
 SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
 SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG,
 SORCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE14,
 SORCTLNGLDT.ORG_ID,
 SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE2,
 SORCTLNGLDT.POSTING_CONTROL_ID,
 SORCTLNGLDT.CREATION_DATE,
 SORCTLNGLDT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 SORCTLNGLDT.CREATE_DATETIME,
 SORCTLNGLDT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
 SORCTLNGLDT.ACTION_CODE,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SORCTLNGLDT,
 (SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD') NSSC
 WHERE
 (
 NOT EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMATL, 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 where SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMATL.SS_CODE
  AND SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
 OR 
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVGLCC,$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMAT , 
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT,
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NARTTYP,
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC
   WHERE EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
   and EOOGCC.SEGMENT1=EVGLCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT2=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
   AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT3=EVGLCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
   AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT4=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT5=EVGLCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
   AND  EOOGCC.SEGMENT6=EVGLCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE
   AND  SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
  AND SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  AND NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
 AND NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=EVGLCC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 )
 OR
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLNGLDT
  WHERE SMSTORCTLNGLDT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  AND SMSTORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID))

SELECT
SMSTORCTLGLDIST.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
CAST(SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS VARCHAR(20)) AS ACCOUNT_CLASS ,     
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG  ,   
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY  ,                  
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,              
COALESCE(EVGLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-998) GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY  , 
SORCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE    ,               
SORCTLNGLDT.LINE_PERCENT  ,      
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN('DM','INV') 
THEN SORCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT ,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN('DM','INV') 
THEN SORCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT ,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' 
THEN SORCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' 
THEN SORCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT,
NULL BK_JE_LN_COMPANY_CODE,
NULL BK_JE_LN_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,   
NULL BK_JE_LN_JE_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
NULL BK_JE_LN_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,    
CAST(NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS VARCHAR(32)) AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE ,   
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    ,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN 'DEBIT' END CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ,
100 AS COGS_PCT ,
CAST(SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID AS BIGINT)  AS SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT,
CAST(NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SS_CODE ,  
-6666 as AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY,
CAST(SORCTLNGLDT.GL_POSTED_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')as GL_POSTED_DT,
SORCTLNGLDT.ACTION_CODE ,
'I' DML_TYPE         
FROM 
		$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SORCTLNGLDT 
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLGLDIST 
		ON ( SMSTORCTLGLDIST.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID 
		AND  SMSTORCTLGLDIST.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON (SMSTORCTLGLDIST.SS_CODE  = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMAT 
		ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
		AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		ON (SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NARTTYP 
		ON ( NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMATL  
		ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
		AND SMATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC
		ON EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVGLCC 
		ON ( EOOGCC.SEGMENT1=EVGLCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT2=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT3=EVGLCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT4=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT5=EVGLCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
		AND  EOOGCC.SEGMENT6=EVGLCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE
AND EVGLCC .SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
		ON ( CAST(SORCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
		AND CAST(SORCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
		
UNION ALL

SELECT
SMSTORCTLGLDIST.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
SOFRCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_CLASS  ,          
SOFRCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG  ,   
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY  ,                  
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,              
COALESCE(EVGLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-998) GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY  , 
SOFRCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE    ,               
SOFRCTLNGLDT.LINE_PERCENT  ,       
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN('DM','INV') 
THEN SOFRCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT ,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN('DM','INV') 
THEN SOFRCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT ,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' 
THEN SOFRCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' 
THEN SOFRCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT,
NULL BK_JE_LN_COMPANY_CODE,
NULL BK_JE_LN_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,   
NULL BK_JE_LN_JE_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
NULL BK_JE_LN_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,    
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE     ,  
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    ,
CASE WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NARTTYP.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN 'DEBIT' END CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ,
100 AS COGS_PCT ,
SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID	SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  SS_CODE      , 
-6666 as AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY,
CAST(SOFRCTLNGLDT.GL_POSTED_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')as GL_POSTED_DT,
SOFRCTLNGLDT.ACTION_CODE ,
'I' DML_TYPE         
FROM 
		$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SOFRCTLNGLDT   
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLGLDIST 
		ON ( SMSTORCTLGLDIST.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID 
		AND  SMSTORCTLGLDIST.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON (SMSTORCTLGLDIST.SS_CODE  = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMAT 
		ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
		AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		ON (SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NARTTYP 
		ON ( NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMATL  
		ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
		AND SMATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC
		ON EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = SOFRCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVGLCC 
		ON ( EOOGCC.SEGMENT1=EVGLCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT2=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT3=EVGLCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT4=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT5=EVGLCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
		AND  EOOGCC.SEGMENT6=EVGLCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE
AND EVGLCC .SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
		ON ( CAST(SOFRCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
		AND CAST(SOFRCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID )
+ SMSTGLDIST.MAX_VAL BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
CAST(SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID AS BIGINT) AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
CAST(NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ,
USER     EDW_CREATE_USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMSTORCTLNGLDT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
from $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLNGLDT ) SMSTGLDIST,
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SORCTLNGLDT
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMAT 
ON  (SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
AND SMAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD' )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON (SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NARTTYP
ON ( NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC
		ON EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTL
ON( SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMARTL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMARTL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON ( NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SMARTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLNGLDT
WHERE SMSTORCTLNGLDT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND SMSTORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID)

SELECT 
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_CLASS      ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG   ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT      ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT           ,             
SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE14       ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE2         ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  ,         
SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  ,    
SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID         ,      
SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID    ,      
SORCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE               ,        
SORCTLNGLDT.ORG_ID                 ,       
SORCTLNGLDT.LINE_PERCENT          ,        
SORCTLNGLDT.POSTING_CONTROL_ID   ,         
SORCTLNGLDT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID    ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.GL_POSTED_DATE     ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.CREATION_DATE     ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.SPLIT_KEY        ,             
SORCTLNGLDT.CREATE_DATETIME  ,             
SORCTLNGLDT.ACTION_CODE     ,              
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SORCTLNGLDT,
(SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD') NSSC
WHERE
(
NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMATL, 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
where SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMATL.SS_CODE
	AND SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVGLCC,$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMAT , 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NARTTYP,
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC
		WHERE EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
		and EOOGCC.SEGMENT1=EVGLCC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT2=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT3=EVGLCC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT4=EVGLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
		AND EOOGCC.SEGMENT5=EVGLCC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
		AND  EOOGCC.SEGMENT6=EVGLCC.BK_PROJECT_CODE
		AND  SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
	AND SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
	AND NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
AND NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=EVGLCC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
)
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLNGLDT
	WHERE SMSTORCTLNGLDT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SMSTORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID))

SELECT 
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_CLASS      ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG   ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.ACCTD_AMOUNT      ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.AMOUNT           ,             
SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE14       ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.ATTRIBUTE2         ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  ,         
SORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  ,    
SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID         ,      
SORCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID    ,      
SORCTLNGLDT.GL_DATE               ,        
SORCTLNGLDT.ORG_ID                 ,       
SORCTLNGLDT.LINE_PERCENT          ,        
SORCTLNGLDT.POSTING_CONTROL_ID   ,         
SORCTLNGLDT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID    ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.GL_POSTED_DATE     ,           
SORCTLNGLDT.CREATION_DATE     ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  ,            
SORCTLNGLDT.SPLIT_KEY        ,             
SORCTLNGLDT.CREATE_DATETIME  ,             
SORCTLNGLDT.ACTION_CODE 
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SORCTLNGLDT
WHERE SORCTLNGLDT.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID)
+ SMSTGLDIST.MAX_VAL BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
USER     EDW_CREATE_USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMSTORCTLNGLDT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
from $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLNGLDT ) SMSTGLDIST,
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SOFRCTLNGLDT 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMAT 
ON  (SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
AND SMAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD' )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON (SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NARTTYP
ON ( NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NARTTYP.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NARTTYP.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EOOGCC
		ON EOOGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = SOFRCTLNGLDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTL
ON( SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMARTL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMARTL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON ( NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SMARTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMSTORCTLNGLDT
WHERE SMSTORCTLNGLDT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND SMSTORCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = SOFRCTLNGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID)
